title: BOXOB Spiky Pain Fidget Keychain, Luminous Fidget Keyring Stimming Anxiety Relief Toy Grippie Stim Keychain Sensory Anxiety Relief Toy for Adults Home Office Travel (Rainbow)
features: Package Included: You’ll receive 1 spiky fidget keychain in a compact size (7x2.4cm/2.76x0.94in), perfect for slipping into your bag. Its silent design makes it ideal for classrooms, offices, travel, or public spaces.
Glow-in-the-Dark Fun: Features a luminous rainbow design that glows in the dark, adding a playful twist and improved visibility for nighttime or low-light use.
Durable 3D-Printed Build: Crafted from premium PLA material using 3D printing technology, this toy is strong, lightweight, and safe to touch—designed for long-lasting use without harming the skin.
Calming Sensory Support: The spiky texture offers gentle yet satisfying tactile feedback, helping to reduce anxiety and improve focus during moments of tension or restlessness.
Thoughtful Gift Idea: A unique and practical gift for anyone who enjoys sensory tools or fidget gadgets—great for kids, teens, or adults needing a little calm in their day.
description: Specification: Color: rainbow Material: PLA Product Size: 7x2.4cm/2.76x0.94in Package details: 1 x spiky fidget keychain Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between monitors, there may be a slight color difference.
